product_description: Cloud-based inventory and recipe-costing software for independent restaurants and small cloud kitchen chains (1-10 outlets). Tracks raw material consumption in real-time, flags wastage, and shows exact cost per dish so owners know their actual margins. Pricing: ₹2,500/outlet/month. Free 14-day trial, no card required.
target_audience: Restaurant owners and F&B entrepreneurs aged 28-45 in tier-1 and tier-2 Indian cities running 1-10 outlets. They track inventory on Excel/WhatsApp today, know they are leaking 8-15% to wastage, and want to scale without hiring more managers. Tech-comfortable but not tech-first.
unique_selling_points: Setup in 30 minutes — no consultant needed
WhatsApp alerts for low stock and wastage spikes
Works offline, syncs when back online (power cut friendly)
Only SaaS with Hindi + English dual interface
